texts.text: Size does not propel the TSR of the 100 largest listed insurers
Size of bubble = market capitalization at 2018 year-end; TBV = tangible book value of equity without OCI (other comprehensive income); P&C = property & casualty; L&H = life & health.
The largest players, as measured in TBV, are often the most challenged in TSR performance—at least in APAC
